title: Form does not submit with button's form attribute
symptom: The button configured with the form attribute does not trigger the form submission. Users see no action when clicking the button.
not_this_if: Button is a standard submit button without the form attribute
root_cause: Using a button with the 'form' attribute may not trigger submission if the button type is not set to 'submit'. This can lead to unexpected behavior in form handling.
fix_steps: Ensure the form attribute correctly references the form ID
Test the button to confirm it triggers the form submission
agent_instruction: Set the button type to 'submit' to ensure it triggers the form submission.
